title: Moving to a New Apartment
content: Sophia spent weeks preparing to move into a new apartment across the city. Packing her belongings took much longer than she expected, especially because she kept stopping to look through old photographs and forgotten objects. On moving day, several friends helped her carry boxes and furniture up the narrow stairs of the building. By the evening, the apartment looked messy and full of unopened boxes, but Sophia already felt excited about the change. The neighborhood seemed quieter, and the large windows brought plenty of sunlight into the rooms. Although moving was exhausting, Sophia enjoyed the feeling of starting a new chapter in a different place.
